title: Better Baby Hostile Mobs (Eyes fixed)
description: Better Baby Hostile Mobs fixes the eyes of the baby zombie, husk & drowned in the newer versions of Minecraft.
body:
# Better Baby Hostile Mobs
**Better Baby Hostile Mobs** fixes the eyes of baby hostile mobs in the newer versions of Minecraft.

The new baby mob models made the eyes look too wide because they are scaled down from the normal mob texture. This resource pack changes the eyes so they use 1 pixel instead of 2, making them look more natural.

> ### What this pack exactly does:
> - Fixes baby zombie eye textures  
> - Reduces eyes to 1 pixel wide  
> - Compatible with new baby mob models

### Before / After images:
<details>
<summary>Before</summary>
  
![Before: Baby hostile mobs use the normal 2-pixel eyes. Because the model is scaled down, the eyes look too wide and a bit strange.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43b1e5194ac4eed8a56c0544e63932c4b5727810_0.webp)
</details>


<details>
<summary>After</summary>
  
![After: The eyes are reduced to 1 pixel, making baby hostile mobs look cleaner and more natural.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/798b69c0a015b79b7ca114553e3ea9ea6e6d8218_0.webp)
</details>

### Individual Images:

<details>
<summary>Baby Zombie</summary>
  
![Baby Zombie: The eyes are reduced to 1 pixel, fixing the stretched look caused by the smaller baby mob model.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57aa4b8209128dfac6c2496d9b9811e9288eeb06_0.webp)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Baby Husk</summary>
  
![Baby Husk: Adjusted eye size to 1 pixel so the face looks cleaner on the scaled baby model.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b57b4987bf14d15c359f750ca34fdc6dd13bced0_0.webp)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Baby Drowned</summary>
  
![Baby Drowned: Eye width reduced to 1 pixel to match the smaller baby mob proportions.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57681ae84b8ebafa14f89bbc6d47a29e6633e188_0.webp)
</details>
